column1: # Seed station data. Each row is one MTA subway station's parent stop_id.
# stop_id is the GTFS parent (3-char form like B16); platforms are <id>N
# downtown). north_label / south_label are MTA's official platform-direction
# labels for that station — used to humanise voice answers and to alias
# direction terms ("toward Manhattan" → N at this station).
# This file ships with only verified entries. To add your own stations
# look up the parent stop_id from MTA's "Subway Stations and Complexes"
# Or run scripts/build-mta-stations.sh on a machine with internet (v1.1).
